nodes.name: api_server.py
nodes.summary: The central Flask application and hub for the entire forex-ai-demo business: ~70 routes covering the ForexAI signal dashboard, LINE/Meta webhooks, FastWork job hunter endpoints, dialysis tracker API, BotKit self-serve sales flow, per-business demo pages, NEXUS Monitor data feeds, SEO tracking, auto-execution trading endpoints, portfolio, and TikTok/Meta app-review compliance pages.

nodes.name: get_all_prices
nodes.summary: Returns live prices for tracked forex pairs plus BTC/ETH for the trading dashboard.

nodes.name: analyze
nodes.summary: Rate-limited AI (Claude) trading signal analysis endpoint — the paid-cost-sensitive public AI entry point for the forex dashboard.

nodes.name: send_line
nodes.summary: Pushes a trading signal or message to a LINE user via the Messaging API.

nodes.name: line_webhook
nodes.summary: Main forex-bot LINE webhook receiver — verifies signature and routes incoming LINE events.

nodes.name: health
nodes.summary: Aggregate health check reporting DB, LINE, and Lullabell LINE readiness.

nodes.name: hunter_check
nodes.summary: Cron-triggered entry point that runs fastwork_hunter.run_hunter() to scan for new job leads.

nodes.name: hunter_status
nodes.summary: Returns the last hunter run's status/summary for the NEXUS Monitor Job Hunter card.

nodes.name: hunter_log
nodes.summary: Returns historical log of jobs the AI hunter has evaluated.

nodes.name: hunter_rss
nodes.summary: Cron-triggered entry point that runs rss_hunter.run() for the RSS-feed lead variant.

nodes.name: get_stats
nodes.summary: Returns visitor/LINE-user/signal counters for the monitor dashboard.

nodes.name: get_roadmap
nodes.summary: Serves roadmap.json content to the monitor dashboard's roadmap card.

nodes.name: get_status_card
nodes.summary: Serves status_card_data.json — a daily progress snapshot.

nodes.name: monitor
nodes.summary: Serves monitor.html, the NEXUS Monitor admin PWA.

nodes.name: pitch_chef
nodes.summary: Serves the live interactive chef/restaurant client pitch/demo page.

nodes.name: pitch_chef_notes
nodes.summary: Serves the presenter cheat-sheet notes page for the chef pitch, meant for tablet use during the live presentation.

nodes.name: _render_demo
nodes.summary: Loads a business config from demo_configs.json and renders it into demo_generic.html via placeholder substitution — the shared engine behind all /demo/<biz> pages.

nodes.name: demo_dialysis
nodes.summary: Serves the dialysis patient-tracking LINE-bot demo (demo_dialysis.html).

nodes.name: dialysis_patients
nodes.summary: Lists dialysis patients from Supabase for the demo UI.

nodes.name: dialysis_create_patient
nodes.summary: Creates a new dialysis patient record with a fixed hemodialysis schedule.

nodes.name: dialysis_update_patient
nodes.summary: Updates an existing patient's schedule — added this session to fix the previously-missing edit-schedule gap; calls dialysis_api.update_patient_schedule().

nodes.name: demo_by_biz
nodes.summary: Config-driven per-business demo page — the core of the BotKit self-serve demo system (beauty/clinic/restaurant/spa) driven entirely by demo_configs.json.

nodes.name: seo_landing
nodes.summary: Serves an SEO landing page for a given slug, logging the visit via seo_tracker.log().

nodes.name: sitemap
nodes.summary: Generates the sitemap.xml submitted to Google Search Console.

nodes.name: autotrade_tick
nodes.summary: Cron-driven endpoint (every 30 min) that calls auto_execution.runner.tick() to advance the paper-trading engine.

nodes.name: autotrade_state
nodes.summary: Returns current paper-trading state for the client-facing autotrade demo.

nodes.name: demo_autotrade
nodes.summary: Serves the client-facing Forex AI Auto-Execution demo page (demo_autotrade.html).

nodes.name: demo_client
nodes.summary: Serves the earlier scripted (button/keyword-driven) per-client chat demo — demo_salon.html-based, distinct from the newer real-AI /demo/chat/ system.

nodes.name: demo_chat_page
nodes.summary: Serves the LINE-mockup real-AI chat demo page (demo_chat_template.html) for a given client slug.

nodes.name: demo_chat_api
nodes.summary: Rate-limited (20/day/IP via ai_guard.rate_limit) endpoint that calls meta_bot.generate_reply() to produce a real AI response for the public chat demo.

nodes.name: api_links
nodes.summary: Serves links.json — the source for the NEXUS Monitor 'doors' quick-link card.

nodes.name: api_board
nodes.summary: Serves board.json — deals/money-in-out and open-task tracking for the monitor dashboard.

nodes.name: api_pulse
nodes.summary: Aggregation endpoint combining multiple live signals into a single 'pulse' summary for the monitor dashboard.

nodes.name: api_ai_health
nodes.summary: Exposes ai_guard.health() — current AI call health status.

nodes.name: api_seo
nodes.summary: Exposes seo_tracker.summary() — the 4-stage SEO progress summary for the monitor SEO card.

nodes.name: meta_health
nodes.summary: Reports Facebook/Meta Messenger integration token/webhook health.

nodes.name: meta_webhook
nodes.summary: Facebook Messenger webhook — verifies and routes events into meta_bot.handle().

nodes.name: lullabell_line_webhook
nodes.summary: LINE OA webhook for the Lullabell client — verifies signature and routes into meta_bot.handle_line().

nodes.name: privacy_page
nodes.summary: Serves the Meta-app-review-required bilingual privacy policy page.

nodes.name: data_deletion_page
nodes.summary: Serves the Meta-app-review-required data deletion instructions page.

nodes.name: portfolio_page
nodes.summary: Serves the reusable client-facing portfolio page, rendered from portfolio.json.

nodes.name: posttoday_page
nodes.summary: Serves the TikTok Content Posting API app-verification landing page.

nodes.name: botkit_page
nodes.summary: Serves the BotKit self-serve sales landing page.

nodes.name: botkit_order
nodes.summary: Receives a BotKit order form submission for manual follow-up (pre-Stripe phase).

nodes.name: list_demos
nodes.summary: Lists available demo businesses for botkit.html and monitor.html to render as cards.

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: Root route — serves the main ForexAI dashboard (dashboard.html).

nodes.name: hunter_tracker
nodes.summary: Serves hunter_tracker.html, the manual Reverse Hunter outreach tracker tool.

nodes.name: posttoday_privacy_page
nodes.summary: Serves the PostToday TikTok app's privacy policy page.

nodes.name: posttoday_terms_page
nodes.summary: Serves the PostToday TikTok app's terms of service page.

nodes.name: get_history
nodes.summary: Returns stored trading signal history for the dashboard's signal history table.

nodes.name: meta_bot.py
nodes.summary: Channel-agnostic AI sales-advisor core shared by three surfaces (FB Messenger, LINE OA, and the public AI demo): builds per-client system prompts from configs/<slug>.json (menu, perks, promos, current Thai date), calls Claude for natural-language replies, auto-detects and pushes booking date/time notifications via a machine-readable tag, and sends replies back through the channel-specific Meta Send API or LINE Reply API.

nodes.name: load_cfg
nodes.summary: Loads and returns a client's configs/<slug>.json business config.

nodes.name: _menu_text
nodes.summary: Formats a config's services/prices into the menu text block inserted into the system prompt.

nodes.name: _system_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the full Claude system prompt: menu, perks/gift/promo text, current Thai date, expiry-checking rule, and booking-tag instructions.

nodes.name: _today_th
nodes.summary: Returns today's date formatted in the Thai Buddhist calendar for date-aware prompt reasoning.

nodes.name: generate_reply
nodes.summary: Core reply-generation function: calls Claude, strips/parses any [[BOOKING: ...]] tag from the raw reply, stores the clean reply in conversation history, and triggers a LINE notification when a valid booking is detected.

nodes.name: _parse_booking_tag
nodes.summary: Regex-parses a [[BOOKING: บริการ=... | วันที่=... | ...]] tag out of an AI reply; requires วันที่ or เวลา present to count as a valid booking.

nodes.name: handle
nodes.summary: FB Messenger webhook handler — parses incoming Messenger events and calls generate_reply(), then send_message().

nodes.name: handle_line
nodes.summary: LINE OA webhook handler — parses incoming LINE events and calls generate_reply(), then send_line_reply().

nodes.name: send_message
nodes.summary: Sends a reply to a customer via the Meta Send API.

nodes.name: send_line_reply
nodes.summary: Sends a reply to a customer via the LINE Messaging reply API.

nodes.name: verify_line_signature
nodes.summary: Verifies the X-Line-Signature header (HMAC-SHA256 + base64) on incoming LINE webhook requests.

nodes.name: dialysis_api.py
nodes.summary: Data-access layer for the dialysis patient-tracking demo — CRUD operations against Supabase `patients` and visit tables, PIN-gated access, and schedule validation.

nodes.name: update_patient_schedule
nodes.summary: PATCHes a patient's `schedule` column in Supabase after validating the new day-pattern via _parse_schedule(); added this session to fix a real product gap (schedules were previously only settable at patient creation).

nodes.name: _parse_schedule
nodes.summary: Validates and normalizes a dialysis day-schedule string/pattern before it is persisted.

nodes.name: demo_dialysis.html
nodes.summary: Interactive LINE-bot-style demo for the dialysis patient-tracking system — menu-driven flows for adding a patient, logging a visit, viewing tomorrow's schedule, and (added this session) editing an existing patient's dialysis-day schedule; calls the /api/dialysis/* endpoints.

nodes.name: demo_salon.html
nodes.summary: Scripted (button-driven + keyword-regex free text) per-client chat demo template served at /demo/client/<slug> — an earlier, non-AI approach kept alongside the newer real-AI demo_chat_template.html system to avoid contradicting the 'this is real AI' claim made to clients.

nodes.name: demo_chat_template.html
nodes.summary: LINE-mockup phone-frame chat UI (built this session) that calls the real AI backend (/api/demo/chat/<slug>) so prospects experience an authentic 'chatting with our bot on LINE' impression while getting genuine Claude-generated replies grounded in the client's real menu/config.

nodes.name: portfolio.html
nodes.summary: Reusable client-facing portfolio page — a JS template renderer that fetches its content entirely from portfolio.json, so new projects are added by editing JSON only, no HTML/JS changes.

nodes.name: links.json
nodes.summary: Server-side config for the NEXUS Monitor 'ประตู' (doors) quick-link card, served via /api/links — grouped lists of active-job links (e.g. tonight's chef pitch links) that get added when a job starts and removed once it's done.

nodes.name: board.json
nodes.summary: Deal-pipeline and money in/out tracker (e.g. Lullabell ฿1,551 won, Forex Auto-Execution ฿35,000 pending) plus open-task notes, served via /api/board to the NEXUS Monitor dashboard's finance card.

nodes.name: roadmap.json
nodes.summary: Phased business roadmap/vision content (e.g. 'close the first review', active goals and to-dos) served via /api/roadmap to the NEXUS Monitor dashboard's roadmap card.

nodes.name: status_card_data.json
nodes.summary: Daily progress snapshot (done/total tasks, percent, list of what was accomplished that day) served via /api/status to the NEXUS Monitor dashboard.

nodes.name: demo_configs.json
nodes.summary: Per-business-type config (beauty/clinic/restaurant/spa) driving the /demo/<biz> and BotKit demo cards — biz_name, emoji, tagline, accent color, greeting, and services/prices; adding a new demo business is a pure JSON edit.

nodes.name: lullabell.json
nodes.summary: Live client config for the Lullabell beauty salon — full menu/pricing (color, spa, retouch), gift/perks/friend-promo/topup-promo text, and advisor rules; consumed by meta_bot.py's _system_prompt() to ground the real AI's replies in accurate, current pricing.

nodes.name: portfolio.json
nodes.summary: Content for the /portfolio page — header copy and a list of 4 showcased projects (Lullabell AI bot, NEXUS Monitor dashboard, dialysis LINE bot, AI booking/queue chat), each linking to a live demo; new work is added as a JSON object only.

nodes.name: pitch_chef.html
nodes.summary: Interactive, screen-shareable demo/pitch page built for a live client presentation to a chef/restaurant prospect, served at /pitch/chef.

nodes.name: pitch_chef_notes.html
nodes.summary: Presenter cheat-sheet page meant to be opened on a tablet during the live chef-pitch presentation, served at /pitch/chef/notes.

nodes.name: DEPLOY_STEPS.md
nodes.summary: Deployment runbook/steps for pushing this project to Render.

nodes.name: Procfile
nodes.summary: Render/Heroku-style process declaration launching `python api_server.py` as the web process.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency list: flask, flask-cors, anthropic, requests.

nodes.name: start_demo.bat
nodes.summary: Windows batch script for launching the demo server locally during development.

nodes.id: คู่มือลูกค้า-ForexAI-Pro.md
nodes.name: คู่มือลูกค้า-ForexAI-Pro.md
nodes.path: คู่มือลูกค้า-ForexAI-Pro.md
nodes.summary: Thai-language client-facing user guide for the ForexAI Pro dashboard/product.

nodes.name: ai_guard.py
nodes.summary: Cross-cutting guard for all Claude API calls: wraps client.messages.create() with health tracking and a cooldown-limited LINE dead-man's-switch alert, plus a public-endpoint IP rate limiter to prevent runaway AI spend.

nodes.name: call
nodes.summary: Armored wrapper around Claude API calls (smart=Sonnet/cheap=Haiku) that tracks health stats and fires a LINE alert via _alert_dead on failure before re-raising.

nodes.name: _alert_dead
nodes.summary: Sends a cooldown-limited (6h) LINE push warning that AI is unreachable, with a diagnostic hint based on the error text (auth/key vs billing/quota).

nodes.name: rate_limit
nodes.summary: In-memory sliding-window rate limiter keyed by IP (default 5 calls/day) used to protect public AI-backed endpoints from abuse.

nodes.name: health
nodes.summary: Returns a snapshot of AI call health (ok/last_ok/last_error/calls/fails) for the /api/ai-health endpoint.

nodes.name: fastwork_hunter.py
nodes.summary: Polls the FastWork jobboard API, keyword-grades listings (A/B/exclude), runs a two-stage AI pipeline (Haiku triage then Sonnet analysis+proposal draft) on new matches, and pushes qualifying leads to LINE while persisting seen-job dedup state to Supabase.

nodes.name: run_hunter
nodes.summary: Main entry point (called by a cron-driven API route): fetches jobs, filters unseen/open ones, grades them, runs the Haiku→Sonnet pipeline, and pushes LINE alerts up to max_alerts.

nodes.name: _match_skills
nodes.summary: Keyword-classifies a job listing into grade A, B, or None (excluded) based on SKILL_KEYWORDS/GRADE_B_KEYWORDS/EXCLUDE_KEYWORDS.

nodes.name: _triage
nodes.summary: Cheap Haiku-based YES/NO pre-filter (via ai_guard.call) to cull obviously irrelevant jobs before paying for a full Sonnet analysis; fails open on error.

nodes.name: _analyze_job
nodes.summary: Calls Sonnet directly to score fit, assess worth, and draft a Thai-language proposal for a job that passed triage.

nodes.name: rss_hunter.py
nodes.summary: Alternate lead-hunter that polls Google Alerts RSS/Atom feeds, filters for genuine hiring-intent posts using shared keyword lists from fastwork_hunter, runs them through Sonnet analysis, and pushes matching leads to LINE.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main entry point: fetches all configured RSS feeds, classifies new items, analyzes qualifying ones with Claude, and pushes LINE alerts.

nodes.name: _classify
nodes.summary: Filters out noise/articles/excluded content and requires a hiring-intent signal before grading a feed item A/B using the shared skill keyword lists.

nodes.name: seo_tracker.py
nodes.summary: Logs every non-internal site visit's referrer/source/query into the Supabase seo_hits table, classifies traffic source, tracks bot crawls vs human hits, computes a 4-stage SEO progress summary, and fires a one-time celebratory LINE push on the first organic visitor.

nodes.name: log
nodes.summary: Records a single page-visit hit (path, source, referrer, query, is_bot) to Supabase and triggers the first-organic-visitor celebration.

nodes.name: summary
nodes.summary: Aggregates the last 7 days of seo_hits rows into stage/traffic-source/keyword/conversion statistics for the /api/seo endpoint and NEXUS Monitor SEO card.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package entry point that re-exports the public API of the Auto-Execution add-on (RiskGuard, broker adapters, Executor, runner, store); documents PAPER MODE as the default with real money requiring a 3-layer unlock.

nodes.name: store.py
nodes.summary: Persists paper-trade open/close records to the Supabase paper_trades table so trade history survives Render restarts, and provides summary/open_trades queries for the customer-facing demo.

nodes.name: risk_guard.py
nodes.summary: Deny-by-default risk management layer every trading signal must pass before reaching a broker — enforces SL/TP presence, min AI confidence, daily loss cutoff, max trades/day, max open positions, sane stop-loss distance, plus a kill-switch halt/resume mechanism.

nodes.name: RiskConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding required risk parameters that must come from explicit customer answers, never silent defaults, when real money is involved.

nodes.name: DailyState
nodes.summary: Tracks per-day mutable trading state (realized PnL, trades count, open positions, halted flag) and auto-rolls to a fresh day.

nodes.name: RiskGuard
nodes.summary: Main guard class exposing check() (7-point pre-trade validation), position_size(), record_open/record_close, halt()/resume() kill switch, and snapshot() for status reporting.

nodes.name: broker_adapter.py
nodes.summary: Common BrokerAdapter interface with three implementations — PaperBroker (fully working simulated broker, default), OandaBroker and MT5Broker (stubbed, pending customer's broker choice) — plus a make_broker() factory that defaults to paper.

nodes.name: BrokerAdapter
nodes.summary: Abstract base class defining place_order/close_order/get_positions/get_balance/health that every broker implementation must provide.

nodes.name: PaperBroker
nodes.summary: In-memory simulated broker (is_live=False) used for all demo/paper trading; computes PnL on close and tracks positions/balance/history.

nodes.name: executor.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the signal → RiskGuard → Broker flow: every trade must pass RiskGuard.check(), enforces the 3-layer real-money unlock falling back to PaperBroker otherwise, and sends LINE alerts on open/close/error/kill-switch events.

nodes.name: Executor
nodes.summary: Central orchestrator class combining a RiskGuard and a resolved BrokerAdapter; exposes handle_signal(), close(), kill_switch(), and status().

nodes.name: handle_signal
nodes.summary: Validates an AI trade signal through RiskGuard, computes position size, places the order via the broker, records the open, and sends a LINE alert.

nodes.name: _resolve_broker
nodes.summary: Implements the 3-layer real-money unlock check; downgrades to PaperBroker unless AUTO_EXEC_MODE=live and AUTO_EXEC_CONFIRM matches CONFIRM_PHRASE.

nodes.name: kill_switch
nodes.summary: Emergency stop that halts the RiskGuard and pushes a LINE alert; callable at any time per the customer T&C.

nodes.name: runner.py
nodes.summary: Cron-driven tick engine (called from /api/autotrade/tick) that rehydrates open paper positions from Supabase, checks positions against live price for SL/TP hits, then asks the AI to analyze each configured pair and routes any signal through Executor/RiskGuard — always PAPER MODE from this entry point.

nodes.name: tick
nodes.summary: Main per-cycle entry point: builds an Executor, hydrates state from Supabase, closes hit positions, analyzes each pair via AI, and opens new positions through RiskGuard-gated handle_signal().

nodes.name: _hydrate
nodes.summary: Restores open paper positions from Supabase into the in-memory PaperBroker after a process restart, keeping RiskGuard's open_positions count consistent.

nodes.name: state
nodes.summary: Returns the customer-facing demo status (balance, PnL, win rate, open trades) by delegating to store.summary().

nodes.name: botkit.html
nodes.summary: Self-serve sales/landing page for the BotKit product (FB/IG auto-reply + booking bot service) — dynamically-loaded demo cards, pricing tiers (Starter/Pro/Business), FAQ, and an order form that submits leads for manual follow-up.

nodes.name: monitor.html
nodes.summary: NEXUS Monitor — the owner's central PWA admin dashboard aggregating daily tasks, project status/roadmap, system health, BotKit orders, deal pipeline/costs, SEO funnel stats, demo showroom, Job Hunter status, Meta bot token health, and Auto-Execution trading state, refreshed every 60s.

nodes.name: dashboard.html
nodes.summary: Older/alternate ForexAI Pro trading dashboard — live price ticker, embedded TradingView chart, an 'Analyze with Claude AI' button producing BUY/SELL/HOLD signal cards, signal history table, LINE alert sending, and an MT5-connection info modal.

nodes.name: demo_autotrade.html
nodes.summary: Client-facing read-only demo page showing Forex AI Auto-Execution paper-trading results (PnL, win rate, trades, AI reasoning) with a disclaimer banner that no real money is involved, plus enforced safety rules; noindex/nofollow.

nodes.name: demo_beauty_salon.html
nodes.summary: Standalone, fully hardcoded beauty-salon Messenger chatbot demo simulating the conversation client-side with no backend calls — an earlier prototype superseded by the demo_generic.html + demo_configs.json templating pattern; likely dead code.

nodes.name: demo_generic.html
nodes.summary: Reusable Messenger chatbot-demo template with placeholder tokens substituted server-side per business type (by api_server.py's _render_demo); simulates the booking flow client-side using the injected config.

nodes.name: hunter_tracker.html
nodes.summary: 'Reverse Hunter' manual-outreach tracker — lets the owner log prospects found with 'symptoms', track daily outreach progress toward a goal, and copy pre-written DM scripts; entirely localStorage-based, zero backend calls, noindex/nofollow.

nodes.name: posttoday.html
nodes.summary: Public marketing/landing page (English) for the 'PostToday' TikTok app required for TikTok Content Posting API verification — features, OAuth connect flow, and requested permissions.

nodes.name: posttoday_privacy.html
nodes.summary: Static Privacy Policy page for the PostToday TikTok app, required for TikTok API review.

nodes.name: posttoday_terms.html
nodes.summary: Static Terms of Service page for the PostToday TikTok app, required for TikTok API review.

nodes.name: privacy.html
nodes.summary: Bilingual (Thai/English) Privacy Policy for the SiriAriyaMate chat-automation service, required for Meta app review — data collected via Messenger/IG DM, storage on Supabase/Render, links to data-deletion page.

nodes.name: data_deletion.html
nodes.summary: Bilingual Data Deletion Instructions page for the SiriAriyaMate service, required by Meta app review — email-based 30-day deletion process.
